description: You are a production supervisor at a manufacturing facility with 4 production lines. Using the 'Production_Lines', 'Orders', and 'Calendar' sheets, build a complete production capacity planning workbook. Create a 'Schedule' sheet that allocates each order to a compatible production line and calculates the assigned line, production start and end dates (based on line capacity and working days), and slack days before the due date. Include a 'Utilization' sheet showing weekly utilization percentages for each line (Week 1: Jan 6-10, Week 2: Jan 13-17, Week 3: Jan 20-24, Week 4: Jan 27-31) with conditional formatting (red for > 90%, yellow for 70-90%, green for < 70%) and a stacked bar chart visualizing weekly utilization across all lines. Add a 'Revenue_Analysis' sheet calculating total expected revenue per order, total revenue by production line, total production cost per line (production days * cost per hour * shift hours), and profit margin per line. Save the completed workbook to /home/ga/Documents/production_planning.xlsx.

metadata.occupation: First-Line Supervisors of Production and Operating Workers
metadata.data_source: Production planning data based on real manufacturing facility metrics and capacity constraints
